Interface SortedOperator

All Superinterfaces:
Named, Operator, Sorted, SyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
IObserverFunction, IProgramMethod, IProgramVariable, OperatorSV, ParsableVariable, ProgramConstruct, QuantifiableVariable, SchemaVariable, TermTransformer, UpdateableOperator
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractSortedOperator, AbstractTermTransformer, AddCast, ArrayBaseInstanceOf, ConstantValue, CreateBeforeLoopUpdate, CreateFrameCond, CreateHeapAnonUpdate, CreateLocalAnonUpdate, CreateWellformedCond, DivideLCRMonomials, DivideMonomials, ElementaryUpdate, EnumConstantValue, Equality, ExpandQueriesMetaConstruct, FormulaSV, Function, IntroAtPreDefsOp, JAbstractSortedOperator, JFunction, JModality, JOperatorSV, Junctor, LocationVariable, LogicVariable, MemberPVToField, MetaAdd, MetaArithBitMaskOp, MetaBinaryAnd, MetaBinaryOr, MetaBinaryXOr, MetaDiv, MetaEqual, MetaGeq, MetaGreater, MetaLeq, MetaLess, MetaMul, MetaPow, MetaShift, MetaShiftLeft, MetaShiftRight, MetaSub, Metavariable, Modality, ModalOperatorSV, ObserverEqualityMetaConstruct, ObserverFunction, ParametricFunctionInstance, ProgramConstant, ProgramMethod, ProgramSV, ProgramVariable, Quantifier, SkolemTermSV, SortDependingFunction, TermLabelSV, TermSV, Transformer, UpdateJunctor, UpdateSV, VariableSV
public interface SortedOperator extends Operator, Sorted
Operator with well-defined argument and result sorts.
